title: R5 #275 — Transport/DOT compliance (FMCSA federal + 7 non-PA states)

did: Built federal FMCSA/DOT baseline: carrier registration, HOS, vehicle requirements, insurance, interstate/intrastate (eCFR + UCR; FMCSA.gov parked 403)
Deep-harvested state DOT overlays for 7 non-PA states: California, Florida, Georgia, Illinois, New York, Ohio, Texas
Merged dot_compliance into #269 state packs; pinned artifacts to GroundTruth/Compliance/lanes/R5_transport_logistics_auto/
recap.state: Federal 16 facts (FOUND 5/5 domains); state overlay 36 facts across 7 states (FOUND 6, REQUIRES_CONFIRMATION 24, ACCESS_RESTRICTED 5)

federal: FMCSA registration portal HTTP 403 — use eCFR Parts 365/390 + UCR.gov

states.Georgia: GA PSC motor-carrier pages SSL certificate expired — all DOT domains ACCESS_RESTRICTED

next: Re-run groundtruth_consolidate_compliance.py to roll DOT facts into canonical pack

vcs_commit_draft.subject: R5 #275: FMCSA federal DOT baseline + 7-state DOT overlays (non-PA)
vcs_commit_draft.body:
RECAP
- Did: Federal FMCSA baseline (16 facts, 5 domains); state DOT overlays for CA/TX/FL/NY/IL/OH/GA (36 facts); pinned GroundTruth lane
- State: Federal roll {'FOUND': 5, 'REQUIRES_CONFIRMATION': 0, 'NOT FOUND': 0, 'ACCESS_RESTRICTED': 0}; state roll {'FOUND': 6, 'REQUIRES_CONFIRMATION': 24, 'NOT FOUND': 0, 'ACCESS_RESTRICTED': 5}; GA PSC SSL parked
- Next: Re-probe FMCSA portal + GA PSC; consolidate into canonical pack

CEILING: Public .gov only; 403/SSL = park; gaps explicit.
